title: MOM AND ME SUPPORT GROUP - 211info
text: ROGUE BIRTH CENTER MOM AND ME SUPPORT GROUP Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Weekly Mom and Me support group with midwives teams and students to discuss about what happens from birth through the first year of parenting, parenting challenges, and support around postpartum depression. 1453 Redwood Circle Grants Pass, OR 97527 Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: Varies Email (541) 916-8333 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (541) 916-8333 Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Walk in or call for information FEES: None DOCUMENTS: None AREA SERVED: Curry, Jackson, and Josephine Counties TRAVEL/LOCATION INFORMATION: Redwood Highway past Gooseberries, turn on Redwood Circle. Located behind Sweet Tea Express parking lot. Services: Parent Support Groups Other Services Offered At This Location: HUMAN REPRODUCTION - MIDWIFERY CARE HUMAN REPRODUCTION - NATURAL CHILDBIRTH AND BREASTFEEDING CLASS If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service.
